description_en: Copenhagen may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 167 halal restaurants and 22 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Copenhagen, Denmark, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Copenhagen: 167+ halal restaurants, 22 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.4/5.
